title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal walks in to see the women dancing in the rain. A surprise awaits Jethalal as he reaches the shop and gets out of the raincoat that Daya made him wear in the morning.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal ensures that Iyer and Babita don't see him returning home splattered in mud. Iyer wants to shoot a video of Jethalal in dirty clothes.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Taarak comes home late from work, Anjali gets worried. Later, she finds Taarak's behaviour quite strange.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Anjali suspects that Taarak is hiding something in his laptop when he behaves in a secretive manner and she starts to worry.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya enters just as Anjali mulls over her next move. She's shocked when Anjali reveals the reason for her worry.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Anjali overhears a conversation between Daya and Jethalal, it upsets her deeply and she decides to leave her house.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Anjali hides in Jethalal and Daya's home. Jethalal follows Taarak and is shocked to see him with a woman.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After coming back home, Jethalal reveals the truth about Taarak and the woman to a shocked Anjali and Champaklal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After Taarak is confronted, he decides to reveal the truth about Kavita. The society members go to the police station.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The parents of Gokuldham Society are very happy and proud of Tapu Sena's efforts in promoting child education.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Madhavi excitedly looks forward to her wedding anniversary. Bhide starts falling in love with Bandya.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu Sena and the other members of Gokuldham Society think Bhide has bought a new scooter and ask for a party.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokhale becomes extremely upset about Bandya's accident. He insults Bhide but is stopped by a defensive Madhvi.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal exposes embarrassing stories from Jethalal's childhood. Tapu skips school to spend time with Champaklal's friends.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu and Jethalal plan to head to the camping site where Champaklal and his friends are staying.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is irked by Bagha's new scheme. Taarak is fed up of disturbances that bother him while he tries to work.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal rushes home from his shop and is in for a shock when Daya breaks the news of Tapu wanting to shave his head.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The Gadas are in a tight situation after learning about the reason behind Tapu's wish to shave his head.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone gathers in the compound of Gokuldham Society and tries to deter Tapu from taking a drastic decision.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu's parents and the society members are proud of him after learning that he shaved his head to support his friend suffering from leukaemia.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal gets highly influenced by London's culture and incorporates the lifestyle in Mumbai. So, when he meets the members of Gokuldham Society, he boasts of his new style.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal gets smitten by the English lady who visits Gokuldham Society in search of Jethalal. But when Daya learns about the lady, she feels insecure.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The ladies of Gokuldham Society meet Daya and fuel her insecurity towards Carey. Meanwhile, Champaklal gets startled by the commotion and calls Jethalal to resolve the matter.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: All the members of Gokuldham Society discover Jethalal's alleged affair and stand in support of Daya. But when Jethalal learns about the allegations, he corrects the misapprehension.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya invites Carey home to give her a grand welcome. On the other hand, Champaklal gets annoyed by Jethalal's new hairstyle and impels him to get a new haircut.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Chaos ensues when Jethalal gets a haircut from a roadside barber while trying to avoid getting spotted by the members of Gokuldham Society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Carey visits Gokuldham Society and gets a grand welcome from all the residents. All members later convince her to cancel her hotel booking and live with them in Gokuldham.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Carey visits all the residents of Gokuldham Society, who help her settle in and clean her apartment. Popatlal later falls for Carey and looks for ways to spend more time with her.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of Gokuldham Society prepare for the first night of Navaratri. On the other hand, Sunder gives a surprise visit to everyone.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The ladies of Gokuldham go to Ahmadabad with Daya in preparation for the festive season of Navratri, which is coming soon.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The ladies of Gokuldham society are still in Ahmadabad. They start to get worried that they will not be able to join the Navratri aarti ritual.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The Gokuldham ladies come back from Ahmadabad to join the ritual, but they unintentionally leave someone behind.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Other members learn that Popatlal gets lost. Daya tells Babuji about her experience in Ahmadabad. While the society begins the festive season of Navratri, Popatlal returns and blames everyone leave him behind.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal does not like that Popatlal may harbour feelings for Kerry. He decides to find a way to ruin their friendship.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Desparate for love, Popatlal decides to ask the ladies of Gokuldham for a makeover. He seeks guidance to impress Kerry.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal takes Kerry to the park for a date, but his behaviour starts to scare her. A group of goons beat him up on their way home.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Kerry tends to Popatlal, who gets beaten up. She happily retells her story to Daya, despite the date failing.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal talks to a friend on the phone about how the world has changed and hopes his family will enjoy long and thriving lives.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and Daya misunderstand each other, causing them to fail in bringing the boy home from Gada Electronics. Ajay Devgn encounters Champaklal and helps him return home safely.

title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
subTitle: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Itti Si Khushi
subTitle: Anvita, a young caregiver, shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings. As she navigates her responsibilities and growing attachment to Virat, she's also supported by Sanjay, who harbours unrequited feelings for her.

title: Pushpa Impossible
subTitle: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Patrakar Popatlal is missing from Bulbul's marriage ceremony. Popatlal stuns everyone when he introduces Bulbul's boyfriend, Rahul.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide gives presents to Tapu Sena to cheer them up and motivate them for their upcoming exams. In the Gada house, Daya and Anjali try to help Jethalal, who has a severe cold.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal invites Bhide, Dr Hatthi, Taarak, Iyer, Jethalal and Sodhi for an urgent meeting and asks them not to reveal details of the discussion to their family.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal discusses his secret plans with some of his friends in the society and asks them not to tell their families.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide pretends to be a reporter and interviews Jackky Bhagnani and Neha Sharma, the cast of Youngistaan, as per Popatlal's request.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal, Taarak, Dr Hatthi and Iyer are thrilled to meet Sodhi, but they feel guilty about lying to their wives.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: An unknown person keeps following and plans to loot Jethalal while he's carrying a huge amount of cash.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: All members of Gokuldham Society discover that Sodhi has disappeared, but the male members try to hide this secret.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: All the women and Champaklal are furious with the men of Gokuldham Society. Bhide files a missing report.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Inspector Pandey investigates Sodhi's garage for leads on his whereabouts. Abdul shows up with shocking news.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Inspector Pandey and Gokuldham Society's members continue to look for Sodhi, who has been missing for several hours.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sodhi's kidnapper demands a huge ransom for his safety. Bhide feels scared to deliver the bad news to Roshan and Gogi.

subTitle: Jethalal chooses to contact Inspector Pandey for assistance and organises the ransom payment, ignoring the kidnapper's caution.

subTitle: The men of Gokuldham Society meet with the kidnapper to hand over the ransom money, but they get themselves in trouble.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The men uncover a surprising truth from the abductors and are taken to meet Sodhi.

subTitle: Jethalal falls into trouble when Nattu Kaka and Bagha order 1,000 mobile phones without his consent. Later, he asks his friend for strategies to sell that phones.

subTitle: Dr Maalpani meets a businessman and plans to make a high-profile transaction with him. The man turns out to be a swindler.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Chaos ensues when Dr Hathi arrives in a tempo and is unable to get off of it. Babita gets excited about her birthday but is disappointed when Iyer cannot celebrate with her.

subTitle: When Babita learns that Iyer and all her loved ones are busy on her birthday, she feels upset. Jethalal rushes to get a nice present for Babita.

subTitle: Jethalal learns it is Babita's birthday and arrives at her house to wish her, but he accidentally leaks Iyer's surprise plans for her.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal rushes to learn western dance forms when he learns about Babita's birthday party. Daya feels devastated when the ladies of Gokuldham inform her about the party's invitation card.

subTitle: As Babita's western birthday party approaches, the residents of Gokuldham Society begin preparing for the big day.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A dejected Jethalal plans to take his family to Lonavala when Babita does not invite him to her birthday party.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and Daya excitedly rush to get the perfect gift for Babita's birthday party. Babita and Iyer's grand party begins in full swing.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and Daya reach right on time for Babita's bash and learn that they failed to get the perfect gift for her. Champaklal attends the party and feels horrified to find Daya in a dress.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Anjali tells Taarak that she gives him healthy food so that he can stay fit. Anjali puts Taarak on a diet after she learns that he has gained 4lbs.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal leaves early from the office to enjoy the delicious food prepared by Daya. Taarak tries to make Anjali give him tasty food by getting her a gift.

subTitle: Jethalal eagerly awaits his mouth-watering dinner, but he feels bad when Daya tells him that Taarak has to diet.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal desperately tries to avoid having Taarak over for dinner. He eventually ends up faking a stomach ache and lands in more trouble than before.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Dr Hathi suggests boiled food for Jethalal and tells Daya to be more careful with his diet for now. The Gadas meet up with famous dancers.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal feels bewildered upon hearing he must travel to America, prompting him to try to find out who made the decision for him.

subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal fires an executive from his phone company. Jethalal decides to give his slippers to Babita as a gift.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After Popatlal throws out his sim card, he decides to buy a new one from Jethalal's electronics shop.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatal is excited after meeting a beautiful girl. He keeps daydreaming that he has married her and brought her home.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: In the hope of luring customers during cricket season, Abdul buys a new TV.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Babita is harassed on her phone by an unknown caller, while Iyer goes to Taarak.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After Taarak's call, Jethalal realises that Iyer thinks he is Babita's mysterious caller. Iyer follows Jethalal, looking for an opportunity to get his hands on Jethalal's second phone.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Unaware that Popatlal is the mysterious caller, the ladies hatch a plan to trap him. Popatlal is elated to finally have a date with his new crush.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: At the restaurant, everyone beats the mysterious caller. They are shocked to learn that the caller is Popatlal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Taarak writes an article about Indian celebrations. Tapu asks Bhide about the arrangements planned for Holi.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu Sena go out to purchase colours for Holi. They receive a warning from two girls about a group of men waiting to throw colours at anyone.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After witnessing a group of men throw colour at a girl, Tapu Sena decide to teach them a lesson. Sonu feels concerned about the men coming back for revenge.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bagha and Nattu Kaka propose a strategy to Jethalal to attract customers to his shop. Holi celebrations are disrupted by the arrival of the men planning revenge on Tapu and his friends.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham Society's members recite poems during the Holi celebrations. The group of men set out to execute their plan.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Plotting revenge on Tapu Sena, Guddu hatches a plan to cause trouble during the Holi celebrations in Gokuldham Society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As Gokuldham Society joyfully celebrates Holi, Guddu and his group focus on Sonu, planning to put colour on her specifically.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Dr Hathi finds himself in trouble as the black marketers of medicines corner him and overhear his conversation with Popatlal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal disguises himself in a desperate effort to meet Dr Maalpani, but he is left baffled after finding out that Dr Maalpani has left.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After failing to perform a sting operation on the black marketers, Popatlal decides to give it another shot with Jethalal at the helm of the operation.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal tells Jethalal that Rang Tarang Resort needs 200 TVs and refrigerators for its rooms. Jethalal becomes ecstatic at the prospect of getting this huge order.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: On Popatlal's insistence, Jethalal decides to leave for the resort as per their plan. He also takes Bagha and Champaklal along for support.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal sets off for the resort. Popatlal rings to enquire about his whereabouts, but the former plays a prank on him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As Popatlal and Bharti eagerly wait for Jethalal to touch down at the resort, they believe that a waiter is keeping an eye on them. Jethalal and Champaklal enjoy the journey to the resort.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal finally arrives at the resort. Popatlal feels upset when he realises that Champaklal and Bagha have tagged along.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Madhvi scolds her daughter for being on the phone while they are looking for Bhide's screw. Champaklal scolds Jethalal when he starts bantering with Daya.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide wants to fix his broken glasses and avoids spending money, but Madhavi insists on him getting a new pair.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide almost drops his new glasses when the Tapu Sena are playing. However, when he finds his glasses broken later, he blames them.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide gives the culprit the chance to come clean. However, Tapu has an alibi, and Jethalal is sure he is innocent.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is about to punish Tapu when Sonu confesses her mistake. Bhide is furious and heart-broken that Sonu is scared of him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham's men plan a secret New Year's party at Popatlal's house, but Champaklal ends up drinking by mistake.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The Gadas invite some members of the society to join their trip to Kutch. Jethalal is upset about Goli joining them without his permission.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham residents travel to Kutch and all are excited about the journey. Jethalal tries his best to find a seat next to Babita.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham residents reach Kutch and Jethalal and Champaklal share various information about the region. All are happy with the beauty of Kutch and arrangements made for Kutch Rann Utsav.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everybody gets up early in the morning to watch the beautiful sunrise and take a ride in the hot-air balloon before visiting the BSF camp.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everybody takes part in the aarti of Godess Aashapura Mata in Kutch and buy souvenirs for other Gokuldham members.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sunder's assistant comes with the construction equipment but problem arises when Dr Hathi falls into mud. Jethalal and Daya decide to buy a plot in Kutch and meet an agent.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide makes frequent calls to Jethalal and disturbs him while he is discussing details of the plot with the agent. The residents of Gokuldham wear traditional clothes worn by the people of Kutch.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sundar's assistant starts maintenance work in the society. Bhide informs the residents about the new safety rules to be followed during the process.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and the others arrive in Kutch and go to a local hotel to have lunch. Iyer is not happy with the sweet food, but Jethalal takes up the challenge to ensure that he enjoys the food.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While enjoying the camel ride with his family and friends, Jethalal's camel takes a different direction and he goes missing.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The police and BSF try to investigate and find Jethalal. Daya becomes restless as the situation gets worse. Jethalal crosses the border and reaches Pakistan.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Pakistani officers interrogate Jethalal. Daya and the rest get news of Jethalal being held captive in Pakistan. Taarak calls up Sodhi and comes to know about Jethalal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya and the family pray for Jethalal's return. The Pakistani authorities decide to put Jethalal in jail. Jethalal answers Bollywood-related queries from other inmates.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: With no update on Jethalal's status, the BSF officer suggests that everyone return home. However, everyone is infuriated with the idea and refuses to budge.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal, Daya and Sodhi decide to go to Delhi and seek help from higher authorities. The residents back at Gokuldham worry about Jethalal's safe return.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: In Delhi, Champaklal, Sodhi and Daya run from pillar to post to get help for Jethalal. In Pakistan, the prison officials try to convince Jethalal to eat.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal's family is relieved to get some assurance from the Ministry of External Affairs. However, they are disheartened to know that there is no timeframe to predict Jethalal's return.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While Daya and the others at Gokuldham society pray at a temple, the police take Jethalal to a cell for interrogation.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal bids goodbye to his cellmates as he gets set to go home. The Gokuldham society members await him.
